title: Daily Life and Errands
focus: Varied everyday language for routines, chores, appointments, city tasks, and staying organized.

sentences.spanish: Hoy tengo una mañana bastante tranquila.
sentences.english: Today I have a fairly quiet morning.

sentences.spanish: Normalmente desayuno algo rápido antes de salir.
sentences.english: I usually have something quick for breakfast before leaving.

sentences.spanish: Estoy intentando acostarme más temprano entre semana.
sentences.english: I am trying to go to bed earlier during the week.

sentences.spanish: Los lunes organizo todo lo que tengo pendiente.
sentences.english: On Mondays I organize everything I have pending.

sentences.spanish: Después de ducharme reviso el horario del día.
sentences.english: After showering I check the day's schedule.

sentences.spanish: A veces preparo comida para llevar a clase.
sentences.english: Sometimes I prepare food to take to class.

sentences.spanish: Necesito salir antes porque el autobús suele llenarse.
sentences.english: I need to leave earlier because the bus usually gets full.

sentences.spanish: Hoy voy con calma, pero no quiero llegar tarde.
sentences.english: Today I am taking it slowly, but I do not want to arrive late.

sentences.spanish: Dejo las llaves siempre en el mismo sitio para no perderlas.
sentences.english: I always leave my keys in the same place so I do not lose them.

sentences.spanish: Antes de salir compruebo si llevo la cartera y el móvil.
sentences.english: Before leaving I check if I have my wallet and phone.

sentences.spanish: Me toca lavar la ropa esta tarde.
sentences.english: It is my turn to do laundry this afternoon.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hay detergente suficiente para otra lavadora?
sentences.english: Is there enough detergent for another load?

sentences.spanish: Voy a barrer la cocina antes de cocinar.
sentences.english: I am going to sweep the kitchen before cooking.

sentences.spanish: Tenemos que sacar la basura antes de las ocho.
sentences.english: We have to take out the trash before eight.

sentences.spanish: El baño necesita una limpieza rápida.
sentences.english: The bathroom needs a quick clean.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedes dejar los platos en el lavavajillas?
sentences.english: Can you put the dishes in the dishwasher?

sentences.spanish: Estoy tendiendo la ropa en el balcón.
sentences.english: I am hanging the laundry on the balcony.

sentences.spanish: La nevera está casi vacía; hay que hacer compra.
sentences.english: The fridge is almost empty; we need to shop.

sentences.spanish: Voy a ordenar mi escritorio para estudiar mejor.
sentences.english: I am going to tidy my desk so I can study better.

sentences.spanish: Si cada uno limpia un poco, la casa se mantiene bien.
sentences.english: If everyone cleans a little, the house stays fine.

sentences.spanish: Tengo que pasar por el banco antes de clase.
sentences.english: I have to stop by the bank before class.

sentences.spanish: Voy a recoger un paquete en la oficina de correos.
sentences.english: I am going to pick up a package at the post office.

sentences.spanish: Necesito imprimir unos documentos para la universidad.
sentences.english: I need to print some documents for the university.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde puedo comprar una libreta barata?
sentences.english: Where can I buy a cheap notebook?

sentences.spanish: Voy a devolver este producto porque no funciona.
sentences.english: I am going to return this product because it does not work.

sentences.spanish: Tengo que hacer una copia de mi pasaporte.
sentences.english: I have to make a copy of my passport.

sentences.spanish: ¿La papelería abre los sábados?
sentences.english: Does the stationery shop open on Saturdays?

sentences.spanish: Quiero comprar una mochila más cómoda.
sentences.english: I want to buy a more comfortable backpack.

sentences.spanish: Voy a renovar mi abono de transporte.
sentences.english: I am going to renew my transport pass.

sentences.spanish: Después haré la compra para toda la semana.
sentences.english: After that I will buy groceries for the whole week.

sentences.spanish: Tengo una cita para abrir una cuenta bancaria.
sentences.english: I have an appointment to open a bank account.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podemos cambiar la cita al jueves por la mañana?
sentences.english: Can we move the appointment to Thursday morning?

sentences.spanish: Llegué diez minutos antes por si había cola.
sentences.english: I arrived ten minutes early in case there was a line.

sentences.spanish: ¿Necesito traer algún documento más?
sentences.english: Do I need to bring any other document?

sentences.spanish: La cita aparece confirmada en mi correo.
sentences.english: The appointment appears confirmed in my email.

sentences.spanish: No puedo asistir a esa hora; tengo clase.
sentences.english: I cannot attend at that time; I have class.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hay algún hueco libre esta semana?
sentences.english: Is there any available slot this week?

sentences.spanish: Prefiero una cita presencial si es posible.
sentences.english: I prefer an in-person appointment if possible.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me puede enviar la confirmación por mensaje?
sentences.english: Can you send me the confirmation by message?

sentences.spanish: Gracias, lo apunto ahora mismo en el calendario.
sentences.english: Thank you, I am putting it in the calendar right now.

sentences.spanish: Mi móvil se está quedando sin batería.
sentences.english: My phone is running out of battery.

sentences.spanish: La aplicación no carga cuando uso datos móviles.
sentences.english: The app does not load when I use mobile data.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hay una red wifi para invitados?
sentences.english: Is there a guest Wi-Fi network?

sentences.spanish: He recibido un código de verificación.
sentences.english: I received a verification code.

sentences.spanish: No me llega el mensaje para iniciar sesión.
sentences.english: I am not receiving the message to log in.

sentences.spanish: Voy a actualizar la aplicación y probar otra vez.
sentences.english: I am going to update the app and try again.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puede escanear este código QR?
sentences.english: Can you scan this QR code?

sentences.spanish: La pantalla está rota, pero todavía funciona.
sentences.english: The screen is cracked, but it still works.

sentences.spanish: Necesito comprar un cargador compatible.
sentences.english: I need to buy a compatible charger.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero recibir notificaciones importantes por correo.
sentences.english: I prefer to receive important notifications by email.

sentences.spanish: Tengo que rellenar este formulario con mis datos.
sentences.english: I have to fill out this form with my information.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde pongo mi dirección actual?
sentences.english: Where do I put my current address?

sentences.spanish: Necesito una copia digital y otra en papel.
sentences.english: I need one digital copy and one paper copy.

sentences.spanish: ¿La firma debe ser igual que en el pasaporte?
sentences.english: Does the signature have to match the passport?

sentences.spanish: Me falta el número de estudiante.
sentences.english: I am missing the student number.

sentences.spanish: ¿Este documento tiene fecha de caducidad?
sentences.english: Does this document have an expiration date?

sentences.spanish: Quiero comprobar que no falta ninguna página.
sentences.english: I want to check that no page is missing.

sentences.spanish: ¿Puede sellar esta copia, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you stamp this copy, please?

sentences.spanish: Enviaré los archivos antes de la fecha límite.
sentences.english: I will send the files before the deadline.

sentences.spanish: Guardaré una copia por si la necesito después.
sentences.english: I will keep a copy in case I need it later.

sentences.spanish: Esta semana la tengo bastante llena.
sentences.english: This week is quite full for me.

sentences.spanish: Podría quedar el martes después de clase.
sentences.english: I could meet on Tuesday after class.

sentences.spanish: Me viene mejor por la tarde que por la mañana.
sentences.english: The afternoon works better for me than the morning.

sentences.spanish: Necesito reservar tiempo para estudiar solo.
sentences.english: I need to reserve time to study alone.

sentences.spanish: Si cambia algo, te aviso con antelación.
sentences.english: If something changes, I will let you know in advance.

sentences.spanish: Vamos a decidirlo hoy para no improvisar mañana.
sentences.english: Let us decide today so we do not improvise tomorrow.

sentences.spanish: Entre semana intento no hacer planes muy tarde.
sentences.english: During the week I try not to make plans too late.

sentences.spanish: El domingo suelo preparar la semana.
sentences.english: On Sunday I usually prepare the week.

sentences.spanish: Tengo un descanso de una hora al mediodía.
sentences.english: I have a one-hour break at midday.

sentences.spanish: Voy a cancelar lo que no sea urgente.
sentences.english: I am going to cancel anything that is not urgent.

sentences.spanish: Parece que va a llover por la tarde.
sentences.english: It looks like it is going to rain in the afternoon.

sentences.spanish: Hace más frío de lo que esperaba.
sentences.english: It is colder than I expected.

sentences.spanish: Voy a llevar una chaqueta ligera por si acaso.
sentences.english: I am going to take a light jacket just in case.

sentences.spanish: El sol aquí es fuerte incluso en primavera.
sentences.english: The sun here is strong even in spring.

sentences.spanish: ¿Necesito paraguas o solo una sudadera?
sentences.english: Do I need an umbrella or just a sweatshirt?

sentences.spanish: El viento en esta zona cambia muy rápido.
sentences.english: The wind in this area changes very quickly.

sentences.spanish: Hoy hace un calor seco y agradable.
sentences.english: Today it is dry and pleasant heat.

sentences.spanish: Me he vestido demasiado formal para este plan.
sentences.english: I dressed too formally for this plan.

sentences.spanish: Voy a comprar zapatos cómodos para caminar más.
sentences.english: I am going to buy comfortable shoes to walk more.

sentences.spanish: Mañana revisaré el tiempo antes de salir.
sentences.english: Tomorrow I will check the weather before leaving.

sentences.spanish: ¿Le importaría dejarme pasar un momento?
sentences.english: Would you mind letting me pass for a moment?

sentences.spanish: ¿Podrías bajar un poco la música?
sentences.english: Could you turn the music down a little?

sentences.spanish: ¿Me ayudas a mover esta mesa?
sentences.english: Can you help me move this table?

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedo usar este enchufe si no te molesta?
sentences.english: Can I use this outlet if it does not bother you?

sentences.spanish: ¿Me guardas el sitio mientras compro agua?
sentences.english: Can you save my seat while I buy water?

sentences.spanish: ¿Sería posible recibirlo mañana?
sentences.english: Would it be possible to receive it tomorrow?

sentences.spanish: ¿Puedes hablar un poco más despacio?
sentences.english: Can you speak a little more slowly?

sentences.spanish: ¿Me dejas revisar el mensaje antes de enviarlo?
sentences.english: Will you let me review the message before sending it?

sentences.spanish: ¿Podemos hacerlo de otra manera?
sentences.english: Can we do it another way?

sentences.spanish: Gracias por entenderlo; de verdad lo aprecio.
sentences.english: Thank you for understanding; I really appreciate it.

sentences.spanish: Quiero empadronarme en esta dirección.
sentences.english: I want to register at this address.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde se solicita la tarjeta de transporte?
sentences.english: Where do you apply for the transport card?

sentences.spanish: Estoy buscando un lugar para reparar la bicicleta.
sentences.english: I am looking for a place to repair my bike.

sentences.spanish: Necesito saber qué días se recoge el reciclaje.
sentences.english: I need to know which days recycling is collected.

sentences.spanish: ¿Hay una biblioteca pública cerca de aquí?
sentences.english: Is there a public library near here?

sentences.spanish: Voy a apuntarme a un gimnasio del barrio.
sentences.english: I am going to join a neighborhood gym.

sentences.spanish: ¿Dónde puedo donar ropa que ya no uso?
sentences.english: Where can I donate clothes I no longer use?

sentences.spanish: Tengo que avisar de un cambio de dirección.
sentences.english: I have to report a change of address.

sentences.spanish: ¿Esta zona es segura para volver de noche?
sentences.english: Is this area safe to come back through at night?

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer mejor los servicios del barrio.
sentences.english: I would like to know the neighborhood services better.
